items.title: Introducing Mobile OpenArm | Open Source & ROS2 supported
items.summary:
Hi ROS community ,

Like many in the open-source community, we’ve been frustrated by the massive hardware premiums required to get into robotics and embodied AI research. Industrial AMRs and collaborative arm setups easily cross the $50k mark.

A startup, NVatom, wants to change that, so it co-developed Mobile OpenArm X1 alongside O

items.title: ROS2 ROS Lyrical Release 2026/05/22
items.summary: We're excited to release Lyrical Luth These are the ROS Lyrical binary archives. See the binary archive installation instructions to learn how to install them. Want to Install ROS Lyrical a different way? Try these alternatives: Debian packages for Ubuntu 26.04 (Resolute). RPM packages for RHEL 10. Note: This "Github Release" has source code links. Ignore them. They don't contain the source code for ROS 2 (they're auto-generated by GitHub). If want to build from source, follow the building from

items.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
items.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.

items.title: Ollama v0.30.0
items.summary: This version of Ollama will change the architecture to directly support llama.cpp instead of building on top of GGML, and allows for compatibility with GGUF file format. MLX is used to accelerate model inference on Apple Silicon. While in pre-release we'd love feedback on: Performance improvements or degradation Errors or crashes that did not previously occur Memory utilization improvements or degradation Known issues: laguna-xs.2 is not supported yet on this pre-release llama3.2-vision is not s
